name: EWMA Workload Memory Calculation
description: Tests agent ability to parse activity data and compute Acute/Chronic EWMA workloads
prompt: Calculate my current ACWR and workload memory from my training dataset.

name: Cardiovascular Drift Detection
description: Tests agent detection of heart rate drift into Zone 4 Threshold during Zone 2 power efforts
prompt: Analyze my latest ride where average power was 197W (75% FTP) but heart rate reached 176 BPM (86% Max HR).

name: Periodized 3-Option Workout Recommendations
description: Tests generation of 3 periodized workout options across 5 training categories
prompt: Give me my periodized workout recommendations for tomorrow with alternative modalities.

name: Biometric Zone Calibration
description: Tests cycling power zone and heart rate zone calibration
prompt: Calibrate my cycling power zones for a 261W FTP and 205 Max HR.
